name: Home Halo
validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Date inconsistency in Item 1 (page 9): Iowa and NM affiliates described as operating 'as Home Halo Agency' both 'prior to December 31, 2024' and 'as of January 1, 2024' — likely editorial typo for Jan
Contact Center fee cap contradiction: Item 6 says 3% cap; Item 19 Table 2 Footnote 6 says 'up to 5%'. Franchise Agreement Article 5.D. confirms 3% cap.
Financial viability flagged on cover page (risk factor #4): total assets $29,513, 'calls into question financial ability to provide services and support'
All 3 primary trademarks are pending USPTO registration only — not federally registered. Cover page risk factor #6.
Item 20 Table 1 net change: Total Outlets 2024 shows +2 but arithmetic suggests +1 (start 1, end 2). Possible source document error.
No related party transaction note in financial statements despite 100% of revenue ($55,013) from Iowa affiliate. Potential disclosure gap.
Income statement shows $1,414 Amortization & Depreciation but balance sheet shows $0 fixed assets and $0 accumulated depreciation. Minor financial statement inconsistency.
Contact Center fee cap: Item 6 (table + Note 9) and FA Article 5.D. state cap of 3% of monthly Gross Sales. Item 19 Table 2 Footnote 6 states 'up to 5% of Gross Sales.'

Iowa/NM affiliate operating dates: Item 1 states 'prior to December 31, 2024, the business operated as a Home Halo Agency' then 'As of January 1, 2024, the business operated as a Home Halo Agency' — d
